ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monitoring_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the monitoring site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the monitoring site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the monitoring site */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the monitoring site */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the monitoring site */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the site was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the site (active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the site */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Additional description of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutants" (
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant */,
  "pollutant_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant (e.g., Ozone, PM10, PM25) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pollutant */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the pollutant */,
  "health_impact" TEXT /* Health impacts of the pollutant */,
  "source" TEXT /* Primary sources of the pollutant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_quality_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each air quality data entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring site where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day the data was collected */,
  "overall_aqi_value" INTEGER /* Overall Air Quality Index (AQI) value */,
  "main_pollutant" TEXT /* Main pollutant responsible for the AQI value */,
  "ozone" REAL /* Ozone concentration */,
  "pm10" REAL /* PM10 concentration */,
  "pm25" REAL /* PM25 concentration */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is valid */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES monitoring_sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_main_pollutant FOREIGN KEY ("main_pollutant") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aqi_categories" (
  "aqi_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AQI category */,
  "aqi_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the AQI category (e.g., Good, Moderate, Unhealthy) */,
  "aqi_lower_bound" INTEGER /* Lower bound of the AQI range for this category */,
  "aqi_upper_bound" INTEGER /* Upper bound of the AQI range for this category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the AQI category */,
  "health_advice" TEXT /* Health advice for the AQI category */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for visual representation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aqi_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutant_concentrations" (
  "concentration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant concentration entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the air quality data entry this concentration belongs to */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollutant this concentration is for */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the pollutant */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the concentration */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used for measuring the concentration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concentration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollutant_concentrations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES air_quality_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollutant_concentrations_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., AQS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the data source */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the air quality data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for security and tracking purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES air_quality_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aqi_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "aqi_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the AQI category this comment belongs to */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or note for the AQI category */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aqi_comments_aqi_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("aqi_category_id") REFERENCES aqi_categories ("aqi_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aqi_comments_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutant_types" (
  "pollutant_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant type */,
  "pollutant_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pollutant type */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the pollutant type is primary or secondary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutant_pollutant_types" (
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollutant */,
  "pollutant_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollutant type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_id", "pollutant_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality flag */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the air quality data entry this flag belongs to */,
  "flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating data quality issue (e.g., invalid, missing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data quality issue */,
  "flagged_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who flagged the data */,
  "flagged_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was flagged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_flags_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES air_quality_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_flags_flagged_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("flagged_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
